description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden cabinet with a dark, textured wood top and a lighter, painted body. The front features a single drawer with an ornate handle above a paneled door, which is adorned with decorative carvings and a metal keyhole. The sides are plain, with subtle molding at the base and top, while the back is constructed from a single piece of wood with a natural finish. The cabinet stands on four curved legs, adding to its classic aesthetic. The hardware, including the drawer handle and door key, is metallic and styled to match the antique look. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and designed for storage in a home, garage, or urban setting.
description: A vintage wooden cabinet with a dark wood top, ornate front drawer and door, and curved legs, finished in two tones. Features decorative hardware and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate drawer, paneled door with keyhole, and decorative carvings.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, light-painted panel and the edge of the dark wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a single, natural wood panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the door key visible and plain paneling.
